name: Agape ATP Corp
business: Agape ATP Corporation is a provider of health and wellness products and advisory services in the Malaysian market. The company also operates in the renewable energy sector through its subsidiary ATPC Green Energy Sdn. Bhd. It sells products through a network marketing distribution channel and serves commercial and industrial clients for green energy solutions.
sellsTo: commercial, industrial, and governmental clients for green energy solutions

exposures.sentence: ATPCTechnology Private Limited ( ATPC Tech ) intent to collaborate with local IT expertise to develop comprehensive digital wellness platform that integrates e-commerce, online consultations, chronic disease management, and robust supply chain services catering to ASEAN market.
AGE delivers innovative solutions for sustainability, energy savings and promoting environmental stewardship to achieve energy efficiency and carbon neutrality for a healthier environment.
The Company is a provider of health and wellness products and advisory services in the Malaysian market.
